seoTitle: Windsor Downs vs Windy — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Windsor Downs and Windy. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Windsor Downs vs Windy: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Windsor Downs and Windy.
heading: Windsor Downs vs Windy — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Windsor Downs, New South Wales and Windy, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Windsor Downs and Windy have similar overall climate risk scores.

faq.question: Is Windsor Downs or Windy safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Windsor Downs has a flood risk score of 28/100, while Windy scores 50/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Windsor Downs scores 30/100 for bushfire risk. Windy scores 17/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Windsor Downs or Windy?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Windsor Downs has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.8% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
